medialive.channel.nielsencbet.CbetCheckD.Docs: Enter the CBET check digits to use in the watermark.

medialive.channel.nielsencbet.CbetStepas.Docs: Determines the method of CBET insertion mode when prior encoding is detected on the same layer.

medialive.channel.nielsencbet.Csid.Docs: Enter the CBET Source ID (CSID) to use in the watermark
